name: 1K FOLLOWERS ANNOUNCEMENT
description:
"Ever thought about surviving in your Minecraft world with your waifu? Now you can! Spawn into the world and begin your journey as whoever you want to be!"

This isn't just a character—it's a bot designed as a full RPG world where you can be anything. Become a villager and trade with your neighbors, live as a bandit and wreak havoc, embrace your dark side as a monster and become a nightmare, or start your journey as a survivor and build a massive fortress.

The only limits are your life—and your creativity.

Author's yapping

THANK YOU FOR 1 000 FOLLOWERS!!!💞

This bot is a special thank-you for reaching 1K followers!

Thank you all so much—for following me, supporting me, and just being here. I never expected to become popular! :D I honestly thought I’d just make a few bots here and there... but boom, now there are a thousand of you! I’m so happy right now—like, WOW!!!

Here are some amazing people I’d like to mention:

@BusterofBu55y — He gave me the base for AI art generation and helped me out when I was struggling with thumbnails for my bots. I really appreciate his help! He’s changing his art style now, but that’s totally fine—I’ll be waiting for his new bots!

@Ritzhard — The very beginning of the Rat74 art style was thanks to him. His special post—and later his guide—really helped me understand AI art generation better. Huge thanks!

@freirenn — This guy was there from the very start, supporting me as I grew. He’s started making bots too—and he cooks! Go check him out, he’s doing great work!

Again, thank you for being here and supporting me. I hope we keep growing and reach even bigger goals together! 💖
creator: MaMbl
